title: FindResult::NotFound carrying Vec<NvmId> dropped silently in get() — intentional
description: get_cached_or_scan calls find_cached_or_scan and discards the Vec<NvmId> inside FindResult::NotFound. A contributor might see the unused Vec and suggest removing it from the enum or making two separate functions. Do not do that: the Vec is the payload for put()'s new-object path — it is the only reason FindResult exists. The get() discard is a consequence of code reuse, not waste. Removing it would require put() to call nvm_list a second time.
